text:
Alright.

The last thing Mark noticed was the antelope grazing peacefully. One antelope. That's all. He looked at his own reflection, noticing that his eyebrows were browner. Just more dirt. He stepped forward slowly. Perhaps it would hop away. Would it?

Nothing happened. Oh. Oh my. That's not fluffy…

That's a dog.

But no. That's not fluffy. That's a rabbit. And look. Her ears! They're floppy. Oh.

He petted her. She twitched.

She's not floppy. She's scared.

And she looks hungry. Perhaps she wouldn't mind a bite?

He opened his mouth.

That's not going anywhere. That won't hurt.

Just bite it. That's a simple thing to do.

With no reaction...

Maybe she likes you.

What's his name?<|endoftext|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|>
